english: Did you review the slides for our presentation tomorrow?
Yes, I did. I think they look great, but we should update the sales graph.
korean: 네, 검토했습니다. 다 좋아 보이는데 매출 그래프는 업데이트하는 게 좋겠어요.

english: When is the deadline for sending the project proposal?
It must be submitted by Friday at five PM. We need to hurry.
Could we schedule a quick meeting to discuss the budget?
Sure, how about tomorrow at two PM? I'm free then.
korean: 예산안을 논의하기 위해 짧은 미팅을 잡을 수 있을까요?
좋습니다, 내일 오후 2시는 어떠신가요? 그때 시간이 괜찮아요.

english: Is the new team member joining us next Monday?
Yes, she will start on Monday. We are setting up her workstation today.
korean: 새로운 팀원분께서 다음 주 월요일에 합류하시나요?
네, 월요일부터 출근하십니다. 오늘 그분의 자리 세팅을 끝마칠 예정이에요.
